tooltip.resident_healing.multiplier_herb: Multiplies the effects of other herbs.
message.resident_healing.max_steroids: Your body can't handle more steroids.
tooltip.resident_healing.boost_health: Boosts max health by 5 hearts, maximum 2 uses.

resident_healing.midnightconfig.herbChes: Chance for Herbs to appear in Villager/Illager chests.

resident_healing.midnightconfig.requireP: If true, Paper is required to craft Mixed Herbs, unless combining Mixed Herbs with another Herb.
